Interface IWorkspaceEdit2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control Workspace Editing.

[Guid("199A1F9D-435A-4118-9B3F-4E0B8F984AA0")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IWorkspaceEdit2 : IWorkspaceEdit

gets changes during edit session
